title: ophrys × pano-lefkaron
intro: Ophrys × pano-lefkaron, also known as the Panolepharon bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys panonica and Ophrys lefkarae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ophrys × pano-lefkaron can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
